parameters.query: SELECT * FROM wazuh_snapshots ORDER BY captured_at DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT captured_at, total_alerts, critical_alerts, high_alerts, medium_alerts, agents_active FROM wazuh_snapshots ORDER BY captured_at DESC LIMIT 168

SELECT a.agent_id, a.agent_name, a.platform, a.status, a.last_seen, fs.total_fim_events, fs.recent_fim_events, fs.captured_at as fim_captured_at FROM wazuh_agents a LEFT JOIN wazuh_fim_snapshots fs ON a.agent_id = fs.agent_id AND fs.captured_at = (SELECT MAX(captured_at) FROM wazuh_fim_snapshots WHERE agent_id = a.agent_id) ORDER BY a.agent_id

SELECT e.agent_id, a.agent_name, e.file_path, e.event_type, e.change_count, e.file_type, e.md5, e.sha1, e.sha256, e.size, e.fim_date, e.captured_at FROM wazuh_fim_events e JOIN wazuh_agents a ON e.agent_id = a.agent_id ORDER BY e.fim_date DESC LIMIT 200

SELECT rule_id, rule_desc, rule_level, rule_groups, hit_count, hour, captured_at FROM wazuh_rule_stats WHERE captured_at >= (SELECT MAX(captured_at) - INTERVAL 5 MINUTE FROM wazuh_rule_stats) ORDER BY hit_count DESC

SELECT hour, total_alerts, high_plus_alerts, syscheck_events, firewall_events, total_events, captured_at FROM wazuh_hourly_trends WHERE captured_at >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 7 DAY) ORDER BY captured_at, hour
SELECT agent_id, agent_name, file_path, change_count, md5, sha256, size, fim_date, captured_at FROM wazuh_critical_fim ORDER BY fim_date DESC LIMIT 200
=SELECT file_path, event_type, change_count, file_type, md5, sha256, size, fim_date, captured_at FROM wazuh_fim_events WHERE agent_id = '{{ $json.query.id }}' ORDER BY fim_date DESC LIMIT 500
=SELECT file_path, change_count, md5, sha256, size, fim_date, captured_at FROM wazuh_critical_fim WHERE agent_id = '{{ $json.query.id }}' ORDER BY fim_date DESC LIMIT 200
=SELECT total_fim_events, recent_fim_events, captured_at FROM wazuh_fim_snapshots WHERE agent_id = '{{ $json.query.id }}' ORDER BY captured_at DESC LIMIT 168

parameters.jsCode:
// Just pass through to trigger the chain
return [{ json: { start: true } }];

parameters.query: SELECT a.agent_name, DATE_FORMAT(e.fim_date, '%Y-%m-%d %H:00:00') AS hour, COUNT(*) AS count FROM wazuh_fim_events e JOIN wazuh_agents a ON e.agent_id = a.agent_id WHERE e.fim_date >= NOW() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR GROUP BY a.agent_name, hour ORDER BY hour ASC, a.agent_name ASC
